bird.name: 中华秋沙鸭
bird.summary: 中华秋沙鸭（学名：Mergus squamatus）为鸭科秋沙鸭属的鸟类，也称鳞胁秋沙鸭、唐秋沙。1989年被列为中国国家一级保护动物，是当时鸭科鸟类中唯一一种，也经常被称为“国鸭”。 分布 分布于俄罗斯西伯利亚以及中国的黑龙江、吉林、河北、珠江大广海湾及长江以南等地，日本、韩…

locations.name: 满洲 (地名)
locations.summary: 滿洲（滿語：ᠮᠠᠨᠵᡠᡤᡠᡵᡠᠨ，羅馬化：Manju Gurun；英語：Manchuria）是東北亞歷史地區，狹義上相當於中国东北地区（即中國的东北三省，亦可包括内蒙古自治區的东四盟市）。广义上则包括曾由中國統治但現屬俄羅斯的外東北（即外…

locations.name: 西伯利亚
locations.summary: 西伯利亞（俄語：Сибирь，羅馬化：Sibir）是烏拉山脈以東廣大地區之總稱，佔北亚的大部分，面積超过1310万平方千米，東至太平洋、北至北冰洋、南至中亚北部。自16世纪下半叶以来至今属于俄罗斯，相當於該國領土总面积的75％，但仅占该国…

relations.subject: 中华秋沙鸭
relations.evidence: It lives in Manchuria and extreme Southeast Siberia, breeding in the north and wintering in the south

relations.subject: 中华秋沙鸭
relations.evidence: Current threats include illegal hunting, entanglement in (ghost) fishing nets and river pollution, as well as ongoing destruction of forest
relations.object_summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。

relations.subject: 中华秋沙鸭
relations.evidence: Current threats include illegal hunting, entanglement in (ghost) fishing nets and river pollution, as well as ongoing destruction of forest
relations.object_summary: 直接捕杀或非法贸易导致种群下降。

relations.subject: 中华秋沙鸭
relations.evidence: Current threats include illegal hunting, entanglement in (ghost) fishing nets and river pollution, as well as ongoing destruction of forest
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

relations.subject: 中华秋沙鸭
relations.evidence: Threats include sand mining, fishing, riparian vegetation destruction, habitat fragmentation, and water pollution
relations.object_summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。
